name: monitor-de-precos-5800x3d
description: Site/app local para monitorar preco do AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scripts/mercadolivre-local-collector.js && node --check scripts/pichau-local-collector.js
scripts.collect:all: npm run collect:pichau && npm run collect:mercadolivre
